steps.title: Scene display area resolved
steps.action: use live scene dimensions for portal placement and drag bounds
steps.expected_visual: portal can be dragged across the full HUD surface

steps.title: Compositor-path diagnostic input
steps.action: inject OS pointer, wheel, and Unicode input into the live overlay
steps.expected_visual: composer focuses, portal drags, and OUTPUT pane scrolls via the normal runtime input path

steps.title: Composer focus gained
steps.action: runtime focus manager focused the composer hit region
steps.expected_visual: subsequent keyboard events route to composer

steps.title: Composer pointer down
steps.expected_visual: keyboard focus should move to composer

steps.title: Composer focus lost
steps.action: runtime focus manager moved focus away from composer

steps.title: Portal drag started
steps.action: header drag surface received pointer down

steps.title: Portal drag ended
steps.action: all portal tiles committed to grouped position
steps.expected_visual: input/output panes remain aligned with portal frame

steps.title: Output transcript scrolled
steps.expected_visual: output text stays clipped inside transcript box

steps.title: Unhandled portal pointer down
steps.action: runtime delivered pointer down for an interaction id without exemplar handling
steps.expected_visual: operator click may appear to do nothing

steps.title: Output transcript scrolled
steps.expected_visual: output text stays clipped inside transcript box

steps.title: Output transcript scrolled
steps.expected_visual: output text stays clipped inside transcript box

steps.title: Compositor-path diagnostic input
steps.expected_visual: transcript should include input:focus-gained, drag:start/drag:end, and scroll:output checkpoints

steps.title: Text Stream Portal scenario complete
steps.action: review transcript and capture UX notes
steps.expected_visual: portal visible until cleanup releases the lease

steps.title: Portal lease released
steps.action: release the lease before closing the session
steps.expected_visual: all portal tiles are removed from the HUD
